v1_reproduction.note: V1 classification is reproduced from schedule/raw/sentinels only. The retained V1 adjudication file is not read by the V2 tool.

q0_null_semantics.note: q=0 logical mappings are tested as null-region membership. q=0 physical A-minus-B reversal is not required because equal work was applied; its pair sum is bounded against 2C rather than C.
